steps.title: Interpret and identify the answer
steps.content:
The variable $x$ represents years since 1997, so $x = 0$ is the year 1997.

The $y$-intercept value of 9,000 represents the estimated number of advertisements sent in 1997.

Choices A and B incorrectly describe this as a minimum value.

Choice C states the wrong number (1,708). That matches choice D — D is correct.
